hub_subtitle: Medical English to welcome guests and present with confidence

lesson.menu_desc: Describe your typical day at the hospital: present simple (I arrive / I start / I finish), shift, break, and telling your day -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Daily Routine at the Hospital
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Graziele Dias | Aula 7 -- Daily Routine

listenings.text: Hello Graziele. Let me tell you about my routine. I arrive at the hospital at eight. I start with the morning meeting. Then I visit my patients on the third floor. At noon, I take a short break for lunch. In the afternoon, I work in my office. I finish at six. It is a long day, but I love my work.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana. Here is the plan for today. The team meeting starts at eight. The doctors arrive at nine. We have a short break at eleven. The big group meeting is in the afternoon. We finish at five today. Have a great day!

extra_audio.text: Graziele arrives at the hospital at seven. She starts her shift. She checks the schedule for the doctors. At noon, she takes a short break. At five, she finishes her day.
